data.acceptance:
1. Agent-visible failure-path instructions for workflow steps use `kno rollback <id>` with the required actor and agent metadata flags.
2. Happy-path instructions continue to use `kno next ...` and remain unchanged for successful completion.
3. Prompt or skill text no longer tells agents to use manual state mutation such as `kno update --status ...` for rollback-style exits.
4. Automated tests cover the emitted failure-path instruction text.
